name_en: 🆕 【Top-tier Original】M80333 Embossed 👏👏 The "Horizon Wallet" is made of leather with black metal hardware. Reinterprets the traditional "Jeep Wallet Vertical" and updates it to a more functional horizontal style. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10. 🎁.
